![DayOfMind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o0NSWXiU/images/30dd4442f5da1001f240de08fb3e7130a56c8a87.jpeg)

# DayOfMind Additions
**Practical expansions and tools for vanilla Minecraft.**

[DayOfMind Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/dayofmind-additions) is a collection of tools and building blocks designed to blend naturally with the base game. Whether you want to speed up resource gathering, terraform large areas more efficiently, or add small details to your builds, this mod offers helpful utility without overcomplicating things.

[![fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/fabric-26.x-707070?style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dayofmind-additions/versions?g=26.1.1&g=26.1)
[![fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/fabric-1.21.x-707070?style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dayofmind-additions/versions?g=1.21.11&g=1.21.10&g=1.21.8&g=1.21.7&g=1.21.6&g=1.21.5&g=1.21.4)

## ✨ Key Features

### 🛠️ Advanced Mining & Terraforming
Tools designed to make terraforming and resource gathering less tedious:
* **Vein Mining Pickaxes:** Mine entire ore veins at once.
* **Terraformer Shovel & Hammer:** Easily create wide paths (Sneak/Shift to toggle between dirt and path blocks).
* **Terraformer Shovel:** Excavate dirt-like blocks in a 3x3 area.
* **Hammer:** Mine stone-like blocks in a 3x3 area.
* **Lumberjack Axe:** Chop down entire trees instantly.
* **Standard Shovel Tweaks:** The vanilla shovel can now also toggle between dirt and path blocks.

*Note: All tools are designed to work with modded blocks as well. If you encounter any unexpected behavior, bug reports are welcome!*

![Shovel feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AcxzUn56/images/884f12fefc2302b5c2527f68d67050cdbbca8f7e.gif)

### 🏗️ Architectural Options
Expand your building palette with new variants for existing materials:
* **Block Variants:** A collection of new slabs, stairs, and trapdoors for various default blocks.
* **Lanterns:** Small, large, and redstone-powered lanterns made from materials like Copper, Amethyst, and Diamond.
* **Redstone Chains:** Conduct redstone power along their axis for compact machinery.

![Redstone Chain and Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AcxzUn56/images/a83c49f94782224cb628566e3eeb91a776ebd55a.gif)

### 🌿 Effects & Nature
Small details to improve the environment:
* **Configurable Leaf Decay:** Faster tree cleanup with adjustable decay speeds.
* **Consistent Block Effects:** All new block variants inherit the specific effects and properties of their base blocks.

---

---

## 🛠️ Technical Details
* Built for the **Fabric Loader**.
* Written in modern **Kotlin**.
* Supports the latest Minecraft versions.
* Dynamically fetches community translations via Crowdin.

## 🚀 Installation
1.  Download the mod from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/dayofmind-additions) or [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dayofmind-additions).
2.  Place the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
3.  Ensure you have the **Fabric API**, **Fabric Language Kotlin**, and **MidnightLib** installed for your Minecraft version.

---
